headline: Molina Healthcare (NYSE:MOH) Surprises on Q2 Earnings, Raises Guidance as Quality Stock Nears Trough in Medicaid Cycle
summary: Molina Healthcare beat Q2 earnings estimates and raised full-year adjusted guidance to at least $5.25 per share, signaling a potential trough in the Medicaid cycle.
